description_long: This object depicts a row of modern, single-story houses arranged along a wide central street, flanked by sidewalks and interspersed with small trees. The houses are boxy and minimalist, with flat roofs and clean lines, suggesting a contemporary architectural style. Each house appears to have a driveway or small front yard, and some feature visible garage doors or entryways. The street is broad and unobstructed, with a few vehicles and clear pedestrian pathways. The color palette is predominantly light gray with occasional accents of red and blue, and the landscaping is sparse but orderly. The overall scene evokes a planned suburban neighborhood with a focus on simplicity and functionality.
description: A row of modern, flat-roofed single-story houses lines a wide street with sidewalks and scattered trees, creating a clean, minimalist suburban neighborhood.
description_view_0: A wide, frontal view of the houses shows the full row, the central street, and the evenly spaced trees along the sidewalks.
description_view_1: A street-level perspective looking down the main road, highlighting the symmetry of the houses and the alignment of trees and driveways.
description_view_2: The rear view of the houses reveals backyards or service areas, with the trees and house backs visible.
description_view_3: Another street-level view from the opposite end, showing the same alignment of houses and trees but from the reverse direction.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entryways with flat doors, some with small porches or driveways, minimal decorative elements
